014package org.gbif.predicate.query;
015
016import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals;
017import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.fail;
018
019import java.time.Instant;
020import java.util.ArrayList;
021import java.util.Arrays;
022import java.util.Date;
023import java.util.List;
024import java.util.Optional;
025import java.util.UUID;
026import org.gbif.api.exception.QueryBuildingException;
027import org.gbif.api.model.Constants;
028import org.gbif.api.model.event.search.EventSearchParameter;
029import org.gbif.api.model.occurrence.search.OccurrenceSearchParameter;
030import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.ConjunctionPredicate;
031import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.DisjunctionPredicate;
032import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.EqualsPredicate;
033import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.GeoDistancePredicate;
034import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate;
035import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.GreaterThanPredicate;
036import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.InPredicate;
037import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.IsNotNullPredicate;
038import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.IsNullPredicate;
039import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.LessThanOrEqualsPredicate;
040import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.LessThanPredicate;
041import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.LikePredicate;
042import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.NotPredicate;
043import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.Predicate;
044import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.RangePredicate;
045import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.WithinPredicate;
046import org.gbif.api.util.IsoDateInterval;
047import org.gbif.api.util.Range;
048import org.gbif.api.util.RangeValue;
049import org.gbif.api.util.SearchTypeValidator;
050import org.gbif.api.vocabulary.Country;
051import org.gbif.api.vocabulary.Language;
052import org.gbif.predicate.query.occurrence.OccurrenceTermsMapper;
053import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
054
055public class SQLQueryVisitorTest {
056
057  private static final OccurrenceSearchParameter PARAM = OccurrenceSearchParameter.CATALOG_NUMBER;
058  private static final OccurrenceSearchParameter PARAM2 =
059      OccurrenceSearchParameter.INSTITUTION_CODE;
060
061  private final SQLQueryVisitor visitor =
062      new SQLQueryVisitor(new OccurrenceTermsMapper(), "defaultChecklistKey");
063
064  @Test
065  public void testComplexQuery() throws QueryBuildingException {
066    Predicate aves =
067        new EqualsPredicate<>(
068            OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXON_KEY, "212", false, "someChecklistKey");
069    Predicate passer =
070        new LikePredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.SCIENTIFIC_NAME, "Passer*", false);
071    Predicate UK = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.COUNTRY, "GB", false);
072    Predicate before1989 = new LessThanOrEqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.YEAR, "1989");
073    Predicate georeferencedPredicate =
074        new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.HAS_COORDINATE, "true", false);
075
076    ConjunctionPredicate p =
077        new ConjunctionPredicate(List.of(aves, UK, passer, before1989, georeferencedPredicate));
078    String where = visitor.buildQuery(p);
079    assertEquals(
080        "(((stringArrayContains(classifications['someChecklistKey'], '212', true))) AND (countrycode = 'GB') AND (lower(scientificname) LIKE lower('Passer%')) AND (year <= 1989) AND (hascoordinate = true))",
081        where);
082  }
083
084  @Test
085  public void testMoreComplexQuery() throws QueryBuildingException {
086    Predicate taxon1 =
087        new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXON_KEY, "1", false, "someChecklistKey");
088    Predicate taxon2 =
089        new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXON_KEY, "2", false, "someChecklistKey");
090    DisjunctionPredicate taxa = new DisjunctionPredicate(List.of(taxon1, taxon2));
091
092    Predicate basis =
093        new InPredicate<>(
094            OccurrenceSearchParameter.BASIS_OF_RECORD,
095            List.of("HUMAN_OBSERVATION", "MACHINE_OBSERVATION"),
096            false);
097
098    Predicate UK = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.COUNTRY, "GB", false);
099    Predicate IE = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.COUNTRY, "IE", false);
100    DisjunctionPredicate countries = new DisjunctionPredicate(List.of(UK, IE));
101
102    Predicate before1989 = new LessThanOrEqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.YEAR, "1989");
103    Predicate in2000 = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.YEAR, "2000", false);
104    DisjunctionPredicate years = new DisjunctionPredicate(List.of(before1989, in2000));
105
106    ConjunctionPredicate p = new ConjunctionPredicate(List.of(taxa, basis, countries, years));
107    String where = visitor.buildQuery(p);
108    assertEquals(
109        "(((arrays_overlap(classifications['someChecklistKey'], array('2','1')))) "
110            + "AND ((basisofrecord IN('HUMAN_OBSERVATION', 'MACHINE_OBSERVATION'))) "
111            + "AND ((countrycode IN(\'GB\', \'IE\'))) "
112            + "AND (((year <= 1989) OR (year = 2000))))",
113        where);
114  }
115
116  @Test
117  public void testConjunctionPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
118    Predicate p1 = new EqualsPredicate<>(PARAM, "value_1", false);
119    Predicate p2 = new EqualsPredicate<>(PARAM2, "value_2", false);
120
121    ConjunctionPredicate p = new ConjunctionPredicate(List.of(p1, p2));
122    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
123    assertEquals(
124        "((lower(catalognumber) = lower(\'value_1\')) AND (lower(institutioncode) = lower(\'value_2\')))",
125        query);
126  }
127
128  @Test
129  public void testDisjunctionPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
130    Predicate p1 = new EqualsPredicate<>(PARAM, "value_1", false);
131    Predicate p2 = new EqualsPredicate<>(PARAM2, "value_2", false);
132
133    DisjunctionPredicate p = new DisjunctionPredicate(List.of(p1, p2));
134    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
135    assertEquals(
136        "((lower(catalognumber) = lower(\'value_1\')) OR (lower(institutioncode) = lower(\'value_2\')))",
137        query);
138  }
139
140  @Test
141  public void testDisjunctionToInPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
142    Predicate p1 = new EqualsPredicate<>(PARAM, "value_1", false);
143    Predicate p2 = new EqualsPredicate<>(PARAM, "value_2", false);
144
145    DisjunctionPredicate p = new DisjunctionPredicate(List.of(p1, p2));
146    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
147    assertEquals("(lower(catalognumber) IN(lower(\'value_1\'), lower(\'value_2\')))", query);
148  }
149
150  @Test
151  public void testDisjunctionToInTaxonPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
152    Predicate p1 =
153        new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXON_KEY, "1", false, "someChecklistKey");
154    Predicate p2 =
155        new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXON_KEY, "2", false, "someChecklistKey");
156
157    DisjunctionPredicate p = new DisjunctionPredicate(List.of(p1, p2));
158    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
159    assertEquals("(arrays_overlap(classifications['someChecklistKey'], array('2','1')))", query);
160  }
161
162  @Test
163  public void testDisjunctionToInGadmGidPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
164    Predicate p1 = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.GADM_GID, "IRL_1", false);
165    Predicate p2 = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.GADM_GID, "GBR.2_1", false);
166
167    DisjunctionPredicate p = new DisjunctionPredicate(List.of(p1, p2));
168    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
169    assertEquals(
170        "(level0gid IN('IRL_1', 'GBR.2_1') OR level1gid IN('IRL_1', 'GBR.2_1') OR level2gid IN('IRL_1', 'GBR.2_1') OR level3gid IN('IRL_1', 'GBR.2_1'))",
171        query);
172  }
173
174  @Test
175  public void testDisjunctionMediaTypePredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
176    Predicate p1 = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.MEDIA_TYPE, "StillImage", false);
177    Predicate p2 = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.MEDIA_TYPE, "Sound", false);
178
179    DisjunctionPredicate p = new DisjunctionPredicate(List.of(p1, p2));
180    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
181    assertEquals(
182        "(stringArrayContains(mediatype,'StillImage',true) OR stringArrayContains(mediatype,'Sound',true))",
183        query);
184  }
185
186  @Test
187  public void testDisjunctionVerbatimToInPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
188    Predicate p1 = new EqualsPredicate<>(PARAM, "value_1", true);
189    Predicate p2 = new EqualsPredicate<>(PARAM, "value_2", true);
190
191    DisjunctionPredicate p = new DisjunctionPredicate(List.of(p1, p2));
192    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
193    assertEquals("(catalognumber IN('value_1', 'value_2'))", query);
194
195    Predicate p3 = new EqualsPredicate<>(PARAM, "value_3", false);
196
197    p = new DisjunctionPredicate(List.of(p1, p2, p3));
198    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
199    assertEquals(
200        "((catalognumber = 'value_1') OR (catalognumber = 'value_2') OR (lower(catalognumber) = lower('value_3')))",
201        query);
202  }
203
204  @Test
205  public void testEqualsPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
206    Predicate p = new EqualsPredicate<>(PARAM, "value", false);
207    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
208    assertEquals("lower(catalognumber) = lower(\'value\')", query);
209  }
210
211  @Test
212  public void testEqualsPredicateGadmGid() throws QueryBuildingException {
213    Predicate p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.GADM_GID, "IRL_1", false);
214
215    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
216    assertEquals(
217        "(level0gid = 'IRL_1' OR level1gid = 'IRL_1' OR level2gid = 'IRL_1' OR level3gid = 'IRL_1')",
218        query);
219  }
220
221  @Test
222  public void testLikePredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
223    // NB: ? and * are wildcards (translated to SQL _ and %), so literal _ and % are escaped.
224    Predicate p = new LikePredicate<>(PARAM, "v?l*ue_%", false);
225    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
226    assertEquals("lower(catalognumber) LIKE lower(\'v_l%ue\\_\\%\')", query);
227  }
228
229  @Test
230  public void testLikeVerbatimPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
231    Predicate p = new LikePredicate<>(PARAM, "v?l*ue_%", true);
232    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
233    assertEquals("catalognumber LIKE \'v_l%ue\\_\\%\'", query);
234  }
235
236  @Test
237  public void testEqualsVerbatimPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
238    Predicate p = new EqualsPredicate<>(PARAM, "value", true);
239    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
240    assertEquals("catalognumber = \'value\'", query);
241  }
242
243  @Test
244  public void testEqualsArrayPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
245    Predicate p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.RECORDED_BY, "value", false);
246    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
247    assertEquals("stringArrayContains(recordedby,'value',false)", query);
248
249    p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.RECORDED_BY, "value", true);
250    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
251    assertEquals("stringArrayContains(recordedby,'value',true)", query);
252  }
253
254  @Test
255  public void testLikeArrayPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
256    // NB: ? and * are the wildcards here.
257    Predicate p = new LikePredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.RECORDED_BY, "v?l*ue_%", false);
258    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
259    assertEquals("stringArrayLike(recordedby,'v?l*ue_%',false)", query);
260
261    p = new LikePredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.RECORDED_BY, "v?l*ue_%", true);
262    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
263    assertEquals("stringArrayLike(recordedby,'v?l*ue_%',true)", query);
264  }
265
266  @Test
267  public void testGreaterThanOrEqualPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
268    Predicate p = new GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.ELEVATION, "222");
269    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
270    assertEquals("elevation >= 222", query);
271  }
272
273  @Test
274  public void testGreaterThanPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
275    Predicate p = new GreaterThanPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.ELEVATION, "1000");
276    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
277    assertEquals("elevation > 1000", query);
278  }
279
280  @Test
281  public void testInPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
282    Predicate p = new InPredicate<>(PARAM, List.of("value_1", "value_2", "value_3"), false);
283    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
284    assertEquals(
285        "(lower(catalognumber) IN(lower(\'value_1\'), lower(\'value_2\'), lower(\'value_3\')))",
286        query);
287  }
288
289  @Test
290  public void testInVerbatimPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
291    Predicate p = new InPredicate<>(PARAM, List.of("value_1", "value_2", "value_3"), true);
292    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
293    assertEquals("(catalognumber IN(\'value_1\', \'value_2\', \'value_3\'))", query);
294  }
295
296  @Test
297  public void testInPredicateDefaultTaxonKey() throws QueryBuildingException {
298    Predicate p = new InPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXON_KEY, List.of("1", "2"), false);
299    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
300    assertEquals(
301        "(taxonkey IN('1','2') OR acceptedtaxonkey IN('1','2') OR kingdomkey IN('1','2') OR phylumkey IN('1','2') OR classkey IN('1','2') OR orderkey IN('1','2') OR familykey IN('1','2') OR genuskey IN('1','2') OR specieskey IN('1','2'))",
302        query);
303  }
304
305  @Test
306  public void testInPredicateBackboneTaxonKey() throws QueryBuildingException {
307    Predicate p =
308        new InPredicate<>(
309            OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXON_KEY,
310            List.of("1", "2"),
311            false,
312            Constants.NUB_DATASET_KEY.toString());
313    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
314    assertEquals(
315        "(taxonkey IN('1','2') OR acceptedtaxonkey IN('1','2') OR kingdomkey IN('1','2') OR phylumkey IN('1','2') OR classkey IN('1','2') OR orderkey IN('1','2') OR familykey IN('1','2') OR genuskey IN('1','2') OR specieskey IN('1','2'))",
316        query);
317  }
318
319  @Test
320  public void testInPredicateTaxonKey() throws QueryBuildingException {
321    Predicate p =
322        new InPredicate<>(
323            OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXON_KEY, List.of("1", "2"), false, "someChecklistKey");
324    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
325    assertEquals("(arrays_overlap(classifications['someChecklistKey'], array('2','1')))", query);
326  }
327
328  @Test
329  public void testInPredicateGadmGid() throws QueryBuildingException {
330    Predicate p =
331        new InPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.GADM_GID, List.of("IRL_1", "GBR.2_1"), false);
332    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
333    assertEquals(
334        "(level0gid IN('IRL_1', 'GBR.2_1') OR level1gid IN('IRL_1', 'GBR.2_1') OR level2gid IN('IRL_1', 'GBR.2_1') OR level3gid IN('IRL_1', 'GBR.2_1'))",
335        query);
336  }
337
338  @Test
339  public void testInPredicateMediaType() throws QueryBuildingException {
340    Predicate p =
341        new InPredicate<>(
342            OccurrenceSearchParameter.MEDIA_TYPE, List.of("StillImage", "Sound"), false);
343    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
344    assertEquals(
345        "(stringArrayContains(mediatype,'StillImage',true) OR stringArrayContains(mediatype,'Sound',true))",
346        query);
347  }
348
349  @Test
350  public void testLessThanOrEqualPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
351    Predicate p = new LessThanOrEqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.ELEVATION, "1000");
352    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
353    assertEquals("elevation <= 1000", query);
354  }
355
356  @Test
357  public void testLessThanPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
358    Predicate p = new LessThanPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.ELEVATION, "1000");
359    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
360    assertEquals("elevation < 1000", query);
361  }
362
363  @Test
364  public void testNotPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
365    Predicate p = new NotPredicate(new EqualsPredicate<>(PARAM, "value", false));
366    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
367    assertEquals("NOT lower(catalognumber) = lower(\'value\')", query);
368  }
369
370  @Test
371  public void testNotPredicateComplex() throws QueryBuildingException {
372    Predicate p1 = new EqualsPredicate<>(PARAM, "value_1", false);
373    Predicate p2 = new EqualsPredicate<>(PARAM2, "value_2", false);
374
375    ConjunctionPredicate cp = new ConjunctionPredicate(List.of(p1, p2));
376
377    Predicate p = new NotPredicate(cp);
378    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
379    assertEquals(
380        "NOT ((lower(catalognumber) = lower(\'value_1\')) AND (lower(institutioncode) = lower(\'value_2\')))",
381        query);
382  }
383
384  @Test
385  public void testQuotes() throws QueryBuildingException {
386    Predicate p = new EqualsPredicate<>(PARAM, "my \'pleasure\'", false);
387    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
388    assertEquals("lower(catalognumber) = lower(\'my \\\'pleasure\\\'\')", query);
389
390    Predicate predicateRecordedBY =
391        new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.RECORDED_BY, "Brian J O'Shea", false);
392    String queryRecordedBy = visitor.buildQuery(predicateRecordedBY);
393    assertEquals("stringArrayContains(recordedby,'Brian J O\\'Shea',false)", queryRecordedBy);
394
395    p = new LessThanOrEqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.ELEVATION, "101");
396    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
397    assertEquals("elevation <= 101", query);
398
399    p = new GreaterThanPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.YEAR, "1998");
400    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
401    assertEquals("year > 1998", query);
402  }
403
404  @Test
405  public void testGeoDistancePredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
406    Predicate p = new GeoDistancePredicate("30", "10", "10km");
407    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
408    assertEquals(
409        "(geoDistance(30.0, 10.0, '10.0km', decimallatitude, decimallongitude) = TRUE)", query);
410  }
411
412  @Test
413  public void testWithinPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
414    final String wkt = "POLYGON ((30 10, 10 20, 20 40, 40 40, 30 10))";
415    Predicate p = new WithinPredicate(wkt);
416    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
417    assertEquals("(contains('" + wkt + "', decimallatitude, decimallongitude) = TRUE)", query);
418  }
419
420  @Test
421  public void testLongerWithinPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
422    final String wkt =
423        "POLYGON ((-21.4671921 65.441761, -21.3157028 65.9990267, -22.46732 66.4657148, -23.196803 66.3490242, -22.362113 66.2703732, -22.9758561 66.228119, -22.3831844 66.0933255, -22.424131 65.8374539, -23.4703372 66.1972321, -23.2565264 65.6767322, -24.5319933 65.5027259, -21.684764 65.4547893, -24.0482947 64.8794291, -21.3551366 64.3842337, -22.7053151 63.8001572, -19.1269971 63.3980322, -13.4948065 65.076438, -15.1872897 66.1073781, -14.5302343 66.3783121, -16.0235596 66.5371808, -21.4671921 65.441761))";
424    Predicate p = new WithinPredicate(wkt);
425    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
426    assertEquals(
427        "((decimallatitude >= 63.3980322 AND decimallatitude <= 66.5371808 AND (decimallongitude >= -24.5319933 AND decimallongitude <= -13.4948065)) AND contains('"
428            + wkt
429            + "', decimallatitude, decimallongitude) = TRUE)",
430        query);
431  }
432
433  @Test
434  public void testAntimeridianWithinPredicate() throws Exception {
435    // A rectangle over the Bering sea, shouldn't have any bounding box added
436    String wkt =
437        "POLYGON((-206.71875 39.20502, -133.59375 39.20502, -133.59375 77.26611, -206.71875 77.26611, -206.71875 39.20502))";
438    String query = visitor.buildQuery(new WithinPredicate(wkt));
439    assertEquals("(contains('" + wkt + "', decimallatitude, decimallongitude) = TRUE)", query);
440  }
441
442  @Test
443  public void testAddedBoundingBoxes() throws Exception {
444    String query;
445
446    // A multipolygon around Taveuni, split over the antimeridian
447    String wktM =
448        "MULTIPOLYGON (((180 -16.658979090909092, 180 -17.12485513597339, 179.87915 -17.12058, 179.78577 -16.82899, 179.85168 -16.72643, 180 -16.658979090909092)), ((-180 -17.12485513597339, -180 -16.658979090909092, -179.8764 -16.60277, -179.75006 -16.86054, -179.89838 -17.12845, -180 -17.12485513597339)))";
449    String bbox =
450        "(decimallatitude >= -17.12845 AND decimallatitude <= -16.60277 AND (decimallongitude >= 179.78577 OR decimallongitude <= -179.75006))";
451    query = visitor.buildQuery(new WithinPredicate(wktM));
452    assertEquals(
453        "(" + bbox + " AND contains('" + wktM + "', decimallatitude, decimallongitude) = TRUE)",
454        query);
455
456    // A polygon around Taveuni, Fiji, as portal16 produces it.
457    // Note the result still contains the multipolygon.
458    String wkt16 =
459        "POLYGON((-180.14832 -16.72643, -180.21423 -16.82899, -180.12085 -17.12058, -179.89838 -17.12845, -179.75006 -16.86054, -179.8764 -16.60277, -180.14832 -16.72643))";
460    query = visitor.buildQuery(new WithinPredicate(wkt16));
461    assertEquals(
462        "(" + bbox + " AND contains('" + wktM + "', decimallatitude, decimallongitude) = TRUE)",
463        query);
464
465    // Same place, but as Wicket draws it:
466    // Note the result still contains the same multipolygon.
467    String wktWk =
468        "POLYGON((179.85168 -16.72643, 179.78577 -16.82899, 179.87915 -17.12058, -179.89838 -17.12845, -179.75006 -16.86054, -179.8764 -16.60277, 179.85168 -16.72643))";
469    query = visitor.buildQuery(new WithinPredicate(wktWk));
470    assertEquals(
471        "(" + bbox + " AND contains('" + wktM + "', decimallatitude, decimallongitude) = TRUE)",
472        query);
473
474    // Tiny areas scattered around the world, all in a single multipolygon.
475    // Requires bounding boxes to avoid very slow Hive performance.
476    String wktMM =
477        "MULTIPOLYGON (((-109.42861 -27.13333, -109.42861 -27.13666, -109.43138 -27.13666, -109.43138 -27.13333, -109.42861 -27.13333)), "
478            + "((-109.42236 -27.10919, -109.42236 -27.11191, -109.42541 -27.11191, -109.42541 -27.10919, -109.42236 -27.10919)), "
479            + "((-174.35146 -19.80528, -174.35146 -19.81829, -174.36338 -19.81829, -174.36338 -19.80528, -174.35146 -19.80528)), "
480            + "((-173.94525 -18.71444, -173.96472 -18.71444, -173.96472 -18.68694, -173.94525 -18.68694, -173.94525 -18.71444)), "
481            + "((-173.91655 -18.66372, -173.94041 -18.66372, -173.94041 -18.63616, -173.91655 -18.63616, -173.91655 -18.66372)))";
482    String bboxMM =
483        "(decimallatitude >= -27.13666 AND decimallatitude <= -18.63616 AND (decimallongitude >= -174.36338 AND decimallongitude <= -109.42236)) AND "
484            + "(((decimallatitude >= -27.13666 AND decimallatitude <= -27.13333 AND (decimallongitude >= -109.43138 AND decimallongitude <= -109.42861)) OR "
485            + "(decimallatitude >= -27.11191 AND decimallatitude <= -27.10919 AND (decimallongitude >= -109.42541 AND decimallongitude <= -109.42236)) OR "
486            + "(decimallatitude >= -19.81829 AND decimallatitude <= -19.80528 AND (decimallongitude >= -174.36338 AND decimallongitude <= -174.35146)) OR "
487            + "(decimallatitude >= -18.71444 AND decimallatitude <= -18.68694 AND (decimallongitude >= -173.96472 AND decimallongitude <= -173.94525)) OR "
488            + "(decimallatitude >= -18.66372 AND decimallatitude <= -18.63616 AND (decimallongitude >= -173.94041 AND decimallongitude <= -173.91655))))";
489    query = visitor.buildQuery(new WithinPredicate(wktMM));
490    assertEquals(
491        "(" + bboxMM + " AND contains('" + wktMM + "', decimallatitude, decimallongitude) = TRUE)",
492        query);
493  }
494
495  @Test
496  public void testWidePolygons() throws Exception {
497    String query;
498
499    // A polygon around Antarctica
500    String wktP =
501        "POLYGON ((180 -64.7, 180 -56.8, 180 -44.3, 173 -44.3, 173 -47.5, 170 -47.5, 157 -47.5, 157 -45.9, 150 -45.9, 150 -47.5, 143 -47.5, 143 -45.8, 140 -45.8, 140 -44.5, 137 -44.5, 137 -43, 135 -43, 135 -41.7, 131 -41.7, 131 -40.1, 115 -40.1, 92 -40.1, 92 -41.4, 78 -41.4, 78 -42.3, 69 -42.3, 69 -43.3, 47 -43.3, 47 -41.7, 30 -41.7, 12 -41.7, 12 -40.3, 10 -40.3, 10 -38.3, -5 -38.3, -5 -38.9, -9 -38.9, -9 -40.2, -13 -40.2, -13 -41.4, -21 -41.4, -21 -42.5, -39 -42.5, -39 -40.7, -49 -40.7, -49 -48.6, -54 -48.6, -54 -55.7, -62.79726 -55.7, -64 -55.7, -64 -57.8, -71 -57.8, -71 -58.9, -80 -58.9, -80 -40, -103.71094 -40.14844, -125 -40, -167 -40, -167 -42.6, -171 -42.6, -171 -44.3, -180 -44.3, -180 -56.8, -180 -64.7, -180 -80, -125 -80, -70 -80, 30 -80, 115 -80, 158 -80, 180 -80, 180 -64.7))";
502    query = visitor.buildQuery(new WithinPredicate(wktP));
503    assertEquals(
504        "((decimallatitude >= -80.0 AND decimallatitude <= -38.3 AND (decimallongitude >= -180.0 AND decimallongitude <= 180.0)) AND contains('"
505            + wktP
506            + "', decimallatitude, decimallongitude) = TRUE)",
507        query);
508
509    // A multipolygon around the Pacific and Indian oceans, split over the antimeridian
510    String wktM =
511        "MULTIPOLYGON (((180 51.83076923076923, 180 -63, 35 -63, 60 -9, 127 1, 157 49, 180 51.83076923076923)), ((-180 -63, -180 51.83076923076923, -138 57, -127 39, -112 18, -92 13, -84 1, -77 -63, -169 -63, -180 -63)))";
512    String bbox =
513        "(decimallatitude >= -63.0 AND decimallatitude <= 57.0 AND (decimallongitude >= 35.0 OR decimallongitude <= -77.0))";
514    query = visitor.buildQuery(new WithinPredicate(wktM));
515    assertEquals(
516        "(" + bbox + " AND contains('" + wktM + "', decimallatitude, decimallongitude) = TRUE)",
517        query);
518
519    // The same polygon, as portal16 produces it.
520    // Note the result still contains the multipolygon.
521    String wkt16 =
522        "POLYGON((35.0 -63.0, 191.0 -63.0, 283.0 -63.0, 276.0 1.0, 268.0 13.0, 248.0 18.0, 233.0 39.0, 222.0 57.0, 157.0 49.0, 127.0 1.0, 60.0 -9.0, 35.0 -63.0))";
523    query = visitor.buildQuery(new WithinPredicate(wkt16));
524    assertEquals(
525        "(" + bbox + " AND contains('" + wktM + "', decimallatitude, decimallongitude) = TRUE)",
526        query);
527
528    // A polygon around the Pacific, as Wicket draws it:
529    String wktWk =
530        "POLYGON((157.0 49.0,127.0 1.0,60.0 -9.0,35.0 -63.0,-169.0 -63.0,-77.0 -63.0,-84.0 1.0,-92.0 13.0,-112.0 18.0,-127.0 39.0,-138.0 57.0,157.0 49.0))";
531    assertEquals(
532        "(" + bbox + " AND contains('" + wktM + "', decimallatitude, decimallongitude) = TRUE)",
533        query);
534  }
535
536  @Test
537  public void testIsNotNullPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
538    Predicate p = new IsNotNullPredicate<>(PARAM);
539    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
540    assertEquals("catalognumber IS NOT NULL", query);
541  }

543  @Test
544  public void testIsArrayNotNullPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
545    Predicate p = new IsNotNullPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.IDENTIFIED_BY_ID);
546    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
547    assertEquals("(identifiedbyid IS NOT NULL AND size(identifiedbyid) > 0)", query);

552    Predicate p = new IsNotNullPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.LIFE_STAGE);

554    assertEquals("(lifestage.lineage IS NOT NULL AND size(lifestage.lineage) > 0)", query);

570    assertEquals("catalognumber IS NULL", query);

576    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
577    assertEquals(

585    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
586    assertEquals("(identifiedbyid IS NULL OR size(identifiedbyid) = 0)", query);

606    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
607    assertEquals("(classificationdetails['defaultChecklistKey']['taxonkey'] = '')", query);

625  @Test
626  public void testPartialDates() throws QueryBuildingException {
627    testPartialDate("2021-10-25T00:00:00Z", "2021-10-26T00:00:00Z", "2021-10-25");
628    testPartialDate("2014-10-01T00:00:00Z", "2014-11-01T00:00:00Z", "2014-10");
629    testPartialDate("1936-01-01T00:00:00Z", "1937-01-01T00:00:00Z", "1936");
630  }
631
632  @Test
633  public void testDateRanges() throws QueryBuildingException {
634    testPartialDate("2021-10-25T00:00:00Z", "2021-10-26T00:00:00Z", "2021-10-25,2021-10-25");
635    testPartialDate("2021-10-25T00:00:00Z", "2021-10-27T00:00:00Z", "2021-10-25,2021-10-26");
636    testPartialDate("2014-05-01T00:00:00Z", "2014-07-01T00:00:00Z", "2014-05,2014-06");
637    testPartialDate("1936-01-01T00:00:00Z", "1941-01-01T00:00:00Z", "1936,1940");
638    testPartialDate("1940-01-01T00:00:00Z", null, "1940,*");
639    testPartialDate(null, "1941-01-01T00:00:00Z", "*,1940");
640    testPartialDate(null, null, "*,*");
641  }
642
643  @Test
644  public void testDateComparisons() throws QueryBuildingException {
645    Predicate p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.LAST_INTERPRETED, "2000", false);
646    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
647    assertEquals(
648        String.format(
649            "(lastinterpreted >= %s AND lastinterpreted < %s)",
650            Instant.parse("2000-01-01T00:00:00Z").toEpochMilli(),
651            Instant.parse("2001-01-01T00:00:00Z").toEpochMilli()),
652        query);
653
654    // Include the range
655    p = new LessThanOrEqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.LAST_INTERPRETED, "2000");
656    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
657    assertEquals(
658        String.format("lastinterpreted < %s", Instant.parse("2001-01-01T00:00:00Z").toEpochMilli()),
659        query);
660
661    p = new GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.LAST_INTERPRETED, "2000");
662    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
663    assertEquals(
664        String.format(
665            "lastinterpreted >= %s", Instant.parse("2000-01-01T00:00:00Z").toEpochMilli()),
666        query);
667
668    // Exclude the range
669    p = new LessThanPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.LAST_INTERPRETED, "2000");
670    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
671    assertEquals(
672        String.format("lastinterpreted < %s", Instant.parse("2000-01-01T00:00:00Z").toEpochMilli()),
673        query);
674
675    p = new GreaterThanPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.LAST_INTERPRETED, "2000");
676    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
677    assertEquals(
678        String.format(
679            "lastinterpreted >= %s", Instant.parse("2001-01-01T00:00:00Z").toEpochMilli()),
680        query);
681  }
682
683  @Test
684  public void testDateRangeComparisons() throws QueryBuildingException {
685    Predicate p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE, "2000-01-02", false);
686    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
687    assertEquals(
688        String.format(
689            "(eventdategte >= %s AND eventdatelte < %s)",
690            Instant.parse("2000-01-02T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond(),
691            Instant.parse("2000-01-03T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond()),
692        query);
693
694    p = new InPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE, Arrays.asList("2000-01-02"), false);
695    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
696    assertEquals(
697        String.format(
698            "((eventdategte >= %s AND eventdatelte < %s))",
699            Instant.parse("2000-01-02T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond(),
700            Instant.parse("2000-01-03T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond()),
701        query);
702
703    p =
704        new InPredicate<>(
705            OccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE, Arrays.asList("2000-01-02", "2024-01-17"), false);
706    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
707    assertEquals(
708        String.format(
709            "((eventdategte >= %s AND eventdatelte < %s) OR (eventdategte >= %s AND eventdatelte < %s))",
710            Instant.parse("2000-01-02T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond(),
711            Instant.parse("2000-01-03T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond(),
712            Instant.parse("2024-01-17T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond(),
713            Instant.parse("2024-01-18T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond()),
714        query);
715
716    p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE, "2000-01-02,2000-01-04", false);
717    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
718    assertEquals(
719        String.format(
720            "(eventdategte >= %s AND eventdatelte < %s)",
721            Instant.parse("2000-01-02T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond(),
722            Instant.parse("2000-01-05T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond()),
723        query);
724
725    p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE, "2000-01", false);
726    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
727    assertEquals(
728        String.format(
729            "(eventdategte >= %s AND eventdatelte < %s)",
730            Instant.parse("2000-01-01T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond(),
731            Instant.parse("2000-02-01T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond()),
732        query);
733
734    p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE, "2000-01,2000-03", false);
735    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
736    assertEquals(
737        String.format(
738            "(eventdategte >= %s AND eventdatelte < %s)",
739            Instant.parse("2000-01-01T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond(),
740            Instant.parse("2000-04-01T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond()),
741        query);
742
743    p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE, "2000", false);
744    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
745    assertEquals(
746        String.format(
747            "(eventdategte >= %s AND eventdatelte < %s)",
748            Instant.parse("2000-01-01T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond(),
749            Instant.parse("2001-01-01T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond()),
750        query);
751
752    p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE, "2000,2001", false);
753    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
754    assertEquals(
755        String.format(
756            "(eventdategte >= %s AND eventdatelte < %s)",
757            Instant.parse("2000-01-01T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond(),
758            Instant.parse("2002-01-01T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond()),
759        query);
760
761    // Include the range (for the or-equal-to)
762    p = new LessThanOrEqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE, "2000");
763    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
764    assertEquals(
765        String.format("eventdategte < %s", Instant.parse("2001-01-01T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond()),
766        query);
767
768    p = new GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE, "2000");
769    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
770    assertEquals(
771        String.format("eventdatelte >= %s", Instant.parse("2000-01-01T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond()),
772        query);
773
774    // Exclude the range
775    p = new LessThanPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE, "2000");
776    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
777    assertEquals(
778        String.format("eventdategte < %s", Instant.parse("2000-01-01T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond()),
779        query);
780
781    p = new GreaterThanPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE, "2000");
782    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
783    assertEquals(
784        String.format("eventdatelte >= %s", Instant.parse("2001-01-01T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond()),
785        query);
786  }
787
788  /** Reusable method to test partial dates, i.e., dates with the format: yyyy, yyyy-MM. */
789  private void testPartialDate(String expectedFrom, String expectedTo, String value)
790      throws QueryBuildingException {
791    Range<Instant> range =
792        Range.closed(
793            expectedFrom == null ? null : Instant.parse(expectedFrom),
794            expectedTo == null ? null : Instant.parse(expectedTo));
795
796    Predicate p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.LAST_INTERPRETED, value, false);
797    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
798
799    if (!range.hasUpperBound() && !range.hasLowerBound()) {
800      assertEquals("", query);
801    } else if (!range.hasUpperBound()) {
802      assertEquals(
803          String.format("(lastinterpreted >= %s)", range.lowerEndpoint().toEpochMilli()), query);
804    } else if (!range.hasLowerBound()) {
805      assertEquals(
806          String.format("(lastinterpreted < %s)", range.upperEndpoint().toEpochMilli()), query);
807    } else {
808      assertEquals(
809          String.format(
810              "(lastinterpreted >= %s AND lastinterpreted < %s)",
811              range.lowerEndpoint().toEpochMilli(), range.upperEndpoint().toEpochMilli()),
812          query);
813    }
814  }
815
816  /** Some dates in HDFS are a number of seconds, others a number of milliseconds. */
817  @Test
818  public void testDateMagnitude() throws QueryBuildingException {
819    Predicate p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE, "2000-01-02", false);
820    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
821    assertEquals(
822        String.format(
823            "(eventdategte >= %s AND eventdatelte < %s)",
824            Instant.parse("2000-01-02T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond(),
825            Instant.parse("2000-01-03T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond()),
826        query);
827
828    p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.LAST_INTERPRETED, "2000-01-02", false);
829    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
830    assertEquals(
831        String.format(
832            "(lastinterpreted >= %s AND lastinterpreted < %s)",
833            Instant.parse("2000-01-02T00:00:00Z").toEpochMilli(),
834            Instant.parse("2000-01-03T00:00:00Z").toEpochMilli()),
835        query);
836
837    p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.MODIFIED, "2000-01-02", false);
838    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
839    assertEquals(
840        String.format(
841            "(modified >= %s AND modified < %s)",
842            Instant.parse("2000-01-02T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond(),
843            Instant.parse("2000-01-03T00:00:00Z").getEpochSecond()),
844        query);
845  }
846
847  @Test
848  public void testIntRanges() throws QueryBuildingException {
849
850    String value = "1990,2011";
851    Range<Integer> range = SearchTypeValidator.parseIntegerRange(value);
852
853    Predicate p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.YEAR, value, false);
854    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
855
856    if (!range.hasUpperBound()) {
857      assertEquals(String.format("year >= %s", range.lowerEndpoint().intValue()), query);
858    } else if (!range.hasLowerBound()) {
859      assertEquals(String.format("year <= %s", range.upperEndpoint().intValue()), query);
860    } else {
861      assertEquals(
862          String.format(
863              "((year >= %s) AND (year <= %s))",
864              range.lowerEndpoint().intValue(), range.upperEndpoint().intValue()),
865          query);
866    }
867  }
868
869  @Test
870  public void testIntInclusiveRangeWithRangePredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
871
872    RangeValue rangeValue = new RangeValue("1990", null, "2011", null);
873    Predicate p = new RangePredicate(OccurrenceSearchParameter.YEAR, rangeValue);
874    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
875    assertEquals(
876        String.format(
877            "((year >= %1$s) AND (year <= %2$s))",
878            Integer.parseInt(rangeValue.getGte()), Integer.parseInt(rangeValue.getLte())),
879        query);
880  }
881
882  @Test
883  public void testIntExclusiveRangeWithRangePredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
884
885    RangeValue rangeValue = new RangeValue(null, "1990", null, "2011");
886    Predicate p = new RangePredicate(OccurrenceSearchParameter.YEAR, rangeValue);
887    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
888    assertEquals(
889        String.format(
890            "((year > %1$s) AND (year < %2$s))",
891            Integer.parseInt(rangeValue.getGt()), Integer.parseInt(rangeValue.getLt())),
892        query);
893  }
894
895  @Test
896  public void testInclusiveExclusiveRangeWithRangePredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
897
898    RangeValue rangeValue = new RangeValue("1990", null, null, "2011");
899    Predicate p = new RangePredicate(OccurrenceSearchParameter.YEAR, rangeValue);
900    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
901    assertEquals(
902        String.format(
903            "((year >= %1$s) AND (year < %2$s))",
904            Integer.parseInt(rangeValue.getGte()), Integer.parseInt(rangeValue.getLt())),
905        query);
906  }
907
908  @Test
909  public void testExclusiveInclusiveRangeWithRangePredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
910
911    RangeValue rangeValue = new RangeValue(null, "1990", "2011", null);
912    Predicate p = new RangePredicate(OccurrenceSearchParameter.YEAR, rangeValue);
913    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
914    assertEquals(
915        String.format(
916            "((year > %1$s) AND (year <= %2$s))",
917            Integer.parseInt(rangeValue.getGt()), Integer.parseInt(rangeValue.getLte())),
918        query);
919  }
920
921  @Test
922  public void testDoubleRanges() throws QueryBuildingException {
923    testDoubleRange("-200,600.2");
924    testDoubleRange("*,300.3");
925    testDoubleRange("-23.8,*");
926  }
927
928  /** Reusable method to test number ranges. */
929  private void testDoubleRange(String value) throws QueryBuildingException {
930    Range<Double> range = SearchTypeValidator.parseDecimalRange(value);
931
932    Predicate p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.ELEVATION, value, false);
933    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
934
935    if (!range.hasUpperBound()) {
936      assertEquals(String.format("elevation >= %s", range.lowerEndpoint().doubleValue()), query);
937    } else if (!range.hasLowerBound()) {
938      assertEquals(String.format("elevation <= %s", range.upperEndpoint().doubleValue()), query);
939    } else {
940      assertEquals(
941          String.format(
942              "((elevation >= %s) AND (elevation <= %s))",
943              range.lowerEndpoint().doubleValue(), range.upperEndpoint().doubleValue()),
944          query);
945    }
946  }
947
948  @Test
949  public void testIntegerRanges() throws QueryBuildingException {
950    testIntegerRange("1950,1960");
951    testIntegerRange("*,2000");
952    testIntegerRange("2000,*");
953  }
954
955  /** Reusable method to test number ranges. */
956  private void testIntegerRange(String value) throws QueryBuildingException {
957    Range<Integer> range = SearchTypeValidator.parseIntegerRange(value);
958
959    Predicate p = new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.YEAR, value, false);
960    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
961
962    if (!range.hasUpperBound()) {
963      assertEquals(String.format("year >= %s", range.lowerEndpoint().intValue()), query);
964    } else if (!range.hasLowerBound()) {
965      assertEquals(String.format("year <= %s", range.upperEndpoint().intValue()), query);
966    } else {
967      assertEquals(
968          String.format(
969              "((year >= %s) AND (year <= %s))",
970              range.lowerEndpoint().intValue(), range.upperEndpoint().intValue()),
971          query);
972    }
973  }
974
975  @Test
976  public void testIssues() throws QueryBuildingException {
977    // EqualsPredicate
978    String query =
979        visitor.buildQuery(
980            new EqualsPredicate<>(
981                OccurrenceSearchParameter.ISSUE, "TAXON_MATCH_HIGHERRANK", false));
982    assertEquals("stringArrayContains(issue,'TAXON_MATCH_HIGHERRANK',true)", query);
983
984    // InPredicate
985    query =
986        visitor.buildQuery(
987            new InPredicate<>(
988                OccurrenceSearchParameter.ISSUE,
989                List.of("TAXON_MATCH_HIGHERRANK", "TAXON_MATCH_NONE"),
990                false));
991    assertEquals(
992        "(stringArrayContains(issue,'TAXON_MATCH_HIGHERRANK',true) OR stringArrayContains(issue,'TAXON_MATCH_NONE',true))",
993        query);
994
995    // LikePredicate
996    try {
997      new LikePredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.ISSUE, "TAXON_MATCH_HIGHERRANK", false);
998      fail();
999    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
1000    }
1001
1002    // Not
1003    query =
1004        visitor.buildQuery(
1005            new NotPredicate(
1006                new EqualsPredicate<>(
1007                    OccurrenceSearchParameter.ISSUE, "TAXON_MATCH_HIGHERRANK", false)));
1008    assertEquals("NOT stringArrayContains(issue,'TAXON_MATCH_HIGHERRANK',true)", query);
1009
1010    // Not disjunction
1011    query =
1012        visitor.buildQuery(
1013            new NotPredicate(
1014                new DisjunctionPredicate(
1015                    List.of(
1016                        new EqualsPredicate<>(
1017                            OccurrenceSearchParameter.ISSUE, "COORDINATE_INVALID", false),
1018                        new EqualsPredicate<>(
1019                            OccurrenceSearchParameter.ISSUE, "COORDINATE_OUT_OF_RANGE", false),
1020                        new EqualsPredicate<>(
1021                            OccurrenceSearchParameter.ISSUE, "ZERO_COORDINATE", false),
1022                        new EqualsPredicate<>(
1023                            OccurrenceSearchParameter.ISSUE, "RECORDED_DATE_INVALID", false)))));
1024    assertEquals(
1025        "NOT (stringArrayContains(issue,'COORDINATE_INVALID',true) OR stringArrayContains(issue,'COORDINATE_OUT_OF_RANGE',true) OR stringArrayContains(issue,'ZERO_COORDINATE',true) OR stringArrayContains(issue,'RECORDED_DATE_INVALID',true))",
1026        query);
1027
1028    // IsNotNull
1029    query = visitor.buildQuery(new IsNotNullPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.ISSUE));
1030    assertEquals("(issue IS NOT NULL AND size(issue) > 0)", query);
1031  }
1032
1033  @Test
1034  public void testAllParamsExist() {
1035    List<Predicate> predicates = new ArrayList<>();
1036    for (OccurrenceSearchParameter param : OccurrenceSearchParameter.values()) {
1037      String value1 = "7";
1038      String value2 = "9";
1039      if (OccurrenceSearchParameter.GEOMETRY == param) {
1040        predicates.add(new WithinPredicate("POLYGON ((30 10, 10 20, 20 40, 40 40, 30 10))"));
1041        continue;
1042      } else if (OccurrenceSearchParameter.GEO_DISTANCE == param) {
1043        predicates.add(new GeoDistancePredicate("10", "20", "10km"));
1044        continue;
1045      } else if (UUID.class.isAssignableFrom(param.type())) {
1046        value1 = UUID.randomUUID().toString();
1047        value2 = UUID.randomUUID().toString();
1048      } else if (Boolean.class.isAssignableFrom(param.type())) {
1049        value1 = "true";
1050        value2 = "false";
1051      } else if (Country.class.isAssignableFrom(param.type())) {
1052        value1 = Country.GERMANY.getIso2LetterCode();
1053        value2 = Country.FRANCE.getIso3LetterCode();
1054      } else if (Language.class.isAssignableFrom(param.type())) {
1055        value1 = Language.GERMAN.getIso2LetterCode();
1056        value2 = Language.FRENCH.getIso3LetterCode();
1057      } else if (Enum.class.isAssignableFrom(param.type())) {
1058        Enum<?>[] values = ((Class<Enum>) param.type()).getEnumConstants();
1059        value1 = values[0].name();
1060        value2 = values[1].name();
1061      } else if (Date.class.isAssignableFrom(param.type())) {
1062        value1 = "2014-01-23";
1063        value2 = null;
1064      } else if (IsoDateInterval.class.isAssignableFrom(param.type())) {
1065        value1 = "2014-01-23,2015-05";
1066        value2 = null;
1067      }
1068
1069      predicates.add(new EqualsPredicate<>(param, value1, false));
1070      if (value2 != null) {
1071        predicates.add(new InPredicate<>(param, List.of(value1, value2), false));
1072      }
1073    }
1074    ConjunctionPredicate and = new ConjunctionPredicate(predicates);
1075    try {
1076      String allParams = visitor.buildQuery(and);
1077    } catch (QueryBuildingException e) {
1078      fail(e);
1079    }
1080  }
1081
1082  @Test
1083  public void testVocabularies() {
1084    Arrays.stream(OccurrenceSearchParameter.values())
1085        .filter(
1086            p ->
1087                Optional.ofNullable(visitor.term(p))
1088                    .map(SQLColumnsUtils::isVocabulary)
1089                    .orElse(false))
1090        .forEach(
1091            param -> {
1092              try {
1093                String hiveQueryField = SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(visitor.term(param));
1094
1095                // EqualsPredicate
1096                String query = visitor.buildQuery(new EqualsPredicate<>(param, "value_1", false));
1097                assertEquals("stringArrayContains(" + hiveQueryField + ",'value_1',false)", query);
1098
1099                // InPredicate
1100                query =
1101                    visitor.buildQuery(
1102                        new InPredicate<>(param, List.of("value_1", "value_2"), false));
1103                assertEquals(
1104                    "(stringArrayContains("
1105                        + hiveQueryField
1106                        + ",'value_1',false) OR stringArrayContains("
1107                        + hiveQueryField
1108                        + ",'value_2',false))",
1109                    query);
1110
1111                // LikePredicate
1112                query = visitor.buildQuery(new LikePredicate<>(param, "value_*", false));
1113                assertEquals("lower(" + hiveQueryField + ") LIKE lower('value\\_%')", query);
1114
1115                // Not
1116                query =
1117                    visitor.buildQuery(
1118                        new NotPredicate(new EqualsPredicate<>(param, "value_1", false)));
1119                assertEquals(
1120                    "NOT stringArrayContains(" + hiveQueryField + ",'value_1',false)", query);
1121
1122                // IsNotNull
1123                query = visitor.buildQuery(new IsNotNullPredicate<>(param));
1124                assertEquals(
1125                    "(" + hiveQueryField + " IS NOT NULL AND size(" + hiveQueryField + ") > 0)",
1126                    query);
1127
1128                // IsNull
1129                query = visitor.buildQuery(new IsNullPredicate<>(param));
1130                if (visitor.isSQLArray(param)) {
1131                  assertEquals(
1132                      " (" + hiveQueryField + " IS NULL OR size(" + hiveQueryField + ") = 0) ",
1133                      query);
1134                } else {
1135                  assertEquals(hiveQueryField + " IS NULL", query);
1136                }
1137
1138              } catch (QueryBuildingException ex) {
1139                throw new RuntimeException(ex);
1140              }
1141            });
1142  }
1143
1144  @Test
1145  public void testGreaterThanEqualsIncludingNull() throws QueryBuildingException {
1146    GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate<OccurrenceSearchParameter> distanceFromCentroidPredicate =
1147        new GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate<>(
1148            OccurrenceSearchParameter.DISTANCE_FROM_CENTROID_IN_METERS, "10");
1149    String query = visitor.buildQuery(distanceFromCentroidPredicate);
1150    assertEquals(
1151        "(distancefromcentroidinmeters >= 10 OR distancefromcentroidinmeters IS NULL)", query);
1152  }
1153
1154  @Test
1155  public void testGreaterThanIncludingNull() throws QueryBuildingException {
1156    GreaterThanPredicate<OccurrenceSearchParameter> distanceFromCentroidPredicate =
1157        new GreaterThanPredicate<>(
1158            OccurrenceSearchParameter.DISTANCE_FROM_CENTROID_IN_METERS, "10");
1159
1160    String query = visitor.buildQuery(distanceFromCentroidPredicate);
1161    assertEquals(
1162        "(distancefromcentroidinmeters > 10 OR distancefromcentroidinmeters IS NULL)", query);
1163  }
1164
1165  @Test
1166  public void testDisjunctionGreaterThanEqualsIncludingNull() throws QueryBuildingException {
1167    GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate<OccurrenceSearchParameter> distanceFromCentroidPredicate =
1168        new GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate<>(
1169            OccurrenceSearchParameter.DISTANCE_FROM_CENTROID_IN_METERS, "10");
1170    EqualsPredicate<OccurrenceSearchParameter> equalsPredicate =
1171        new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXON_KEY, "6", false);
1172    DisjunctionPredicate disjunctionPredicate =
1173        new DisjunctionPredicate(Arrays.asList(equalsPredicate, distanceFromCentroidPredicate));
1174    String query = visitor.buildQuery(disjunctionPredicate);
1175    assertEquals(
1176        "(((taxonkey = '6' OR acceptedtaxonkey = '6' OR kingdomkey = '6' OR phylumkey = '6' OR classkey = '6' OR orderkey = '6' OR familykey = '6' OR genuskey = '6' OR specieskey = '6')) OR ((distancefromcentroidinmeters >= 10 OR distancefromcentroidinmeters IS NULL)))",
1177        query);
1178  }
1179
1180  @Test
1181  public void testGeoTimePredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
1182    Predicate predicate =
1183        new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.GEOLOGICAL_TIME, "12", false);
1184    String query = visitor.buildQuery(predicate);
1185    assertEquals("12 > geologicaltime.gt AND 12 <= geologicaltime.lte", query);
1186
1187    Predicate rangePredicate =
1188        new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.GEOLOGICAL_TIME, "12,15", false);
1189    query = visitor.buildQuery(rangePredicate);
1190    assertEquals("geologicaltime.gt >= 12.0 AND geologicaltime.lte <= 15.0", query);
1191
1192    rangePredicate =
1193        new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.GEOLOGICAL_TIME, "12,*", false);
1194    query = visitor.buildQuery(rangePredicate);
1195    assertEquals("geologicaltime.gt >= 12.0", query);
1196
1197    rangePredicate =
1198        new EqualsPredicate<>(OccurrenceSearchParameter.GEOLOGICAL_TIME, "*,15", false);
1199    query = visitor.buildQuery(rangePredicate);
1200    assertEquals("geologicaltime.lte <= 15.0", query);
1201  }
1202
1203  @Test
1204  public void testBackboneTaxonomyEqualsPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
1205    EqualsPredicate<OccurrenceSearchParameter> equalsPredicate =
1206        new EqualsPredicate<>(
1207            OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXON_KEY,
1208            "6",
1209            false,
1210            "d7dddbf4-2cf0-4f39-9b2a-bb099caae36c");
1211
1212    String query = visitor.buildQuery(equalsPredicate);
1213    assertEquals(
1214        "(taxonkey = '6' OR acceptedtaxonkey = '6' OR kingdomkey = '6' OR phylumkey = '6' OR classkey = '6' OR orderkey = '6' OR familykey = '6' OR genuskey = '6' OR specieskey = '6')",
1215        query);
1216  }

1218  @Test
1219  public void testMultiTaxonomyEqualsPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {

1226  @Test
1227  public void testMultiTaxonomyInPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
1228    InPredicate<OccurrenceSearchParameter> inPredicate =
1229        new InPredicate<>(
1230            OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXON_KEY, List.of("6", "7"), false, "my-checklist-uuid");
1231    String query = visitor.buildQuery(inPredicate);
1232    assertEquals("(arrays_overlap(classifications['my-checklist-uuid'], array('7','6')))", query);
1233  }

1235  @Test
1236  public void testMultiTaxonomyDisjunctionPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
1237    DisjunctionPredicate predicate =
1238        new DisjunctionPredicate(
1239            Arrays.asList(
1240                new EqualsPredicate<>(
1241                    OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXON_KEY, "6", false, "my-checklist-uuid-1"),
1242                new EqualsPredicate<>(
1243                    OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXON_KEY, "7", false, "my-checklist-uuid-2")));
1244    String query = visitor.buildQuery(predicate);
1245    assertEquals(
1246        "(((stringArrayContains(classifications['my-checklist-uuid-1'], '6', true))) OR ((stringArrayContains(classifications['my-checklist-uuid-2'], '7', true))))",
1247        query);
1248  }

1256                    OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXON_KEY, "6", false, "my-checklist-uuid-1"),

1261        "(((stringArrayContains(classifications['my-checklist-uuid-1'], '6', true))) AND ((stringArrayContains(classifications['my-checklist-uuid-2'], '7', true))))",

1283  @Test
1284  public void testTaxonomicStatusMultiplePredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {

1312  @Test
1313  public void testHumboldtAlias() throws QueryBuildingException {

1315    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
1316    assertEquals("h.sitecount = 1", query);

1319  @Test
1320  public void testHumboldtEventDuration() throws QueryBuildingException {
1321    Predicate p =
1322        new EqualsPredicate<>(
1323            EventSearchParameter.HUMBOLDT_EVENT_DURATION_VALUE_IN_MINUTES, "1", false);
1324    String query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
1325    assertEquals("h.humboldteventdurationvalueinminutes = 1", query);
1326
1327    p =
1328        new EqualsPredicate<>(
1329            EventSearchParameter.HUMBOLDT_EVENT_DURATION_VALUE_IN_MINUTES, "1,3", false);
1330    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
1331    assertEquals(
1332        "((h.humboldteventdurationvalueinminutes >= 1.0) AND (h.humboldteventdurationvalueinminutes <= 3.0))",
1333        query);
1334
1335    p =
1336        new EqualsPredicate<>(
1337            EventSearchParameter.HUMBOLDT_EVENT_DURATION_VALUE_IN_MINUTES, "1,*", false);
1338    query = visitor.buildQuery(p);
1339    assertEquals("h.humboldteventdurationvalueinminutes >= 1.0", query);
1340  }

1342  @Test
1343  public void testHumboldtTaxonomyEqualsPredicate() throws QueryBuildingException {
1344    EqualsPredicate<EventSearchParameter> equalsPredicate =
1345        new EqualsPredicate<>(
1346            EventSearchParameter.HUMBOLDT_TARGET_TAXONOMIC_SCOPE_TAXON_KEY, "6", false, "def");
1347    String query = visitor.buildQuery(equalsPredicate);
1348    assertEquals(
1349        "(stringArrayContains(h.targettaxonomicscope['def']['taxonkeys'], '6', true))", query);

1352        new EqualsPredicate<>(
1353            EventSearchParameter.HUMBOLDT_TARGET_TAXONOMIC_SCOPE_USAGE_KEY, "6", false, "def");
1354    query = visitor.buildQuery(equalsPredicate);
1355    assertEquals(
1356        "(stringArrayContains(h.targettaxonomicscope['def']['usagekey'], '6', true))", query);
1357  }

1359  @Test
1360  public void testHumboldtFields() throws QueryBuildingException {
1361    EqualsPredicate<EventSearchParameter> equalsPredicate =
1362        new EqualsPredicate<>(EventSearchParameter.HUMBOLDT_SITE_COUNT, "1", false);
1363    String query = visitor.buildQuery(equalsPredicate);
1364    assertEquals("h.sitecount = 1", query);

1367        new EqualsPredicate<>(
1368            EventSearchParameter.HUMBOLDT_IS_ABSENCE_REPORTED, "true", false, "def");
1369    query = visitor.buildQuery(equalsPredicate);
1370    assertEquals("h.isabsencereported = true", query);
1371  }
